creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
From: <hetzels@westbend.net>
>This is a new/updated port for the Apache-FP web server using Apache
v1.3.3.
>
>Please move the Apache-FP port to apache12-fp.
>
>Then add this port as apache13-fp.

Also pr ports/6915 should be canceled, as it is an old port for the
Apache-Fp 1.3.0 server.
